text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! Birthday wishes from Prez! Cough! I choked!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, that's 'cause you're way too happy. Guess
that means you're still a kid at heart.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
But come on, this is Prez we're talking about! How
else am I supposed to react when someone I
respect so much wishes me happy birthday?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I'm glad I said it then. But what if I told you I
have a present for you as well?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: A present from you?! Th-th-thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I asked around about your tastes and settled on
mango tarts—hopefully they're up to your
standards.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Uwahhh! I LOVE mangoes! This is the BEST
birthday ever!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hnnghhh, I can't take this anymore! Why do you
get to hog all the happy memories?!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Whaaat? Uh, because it's my birthday?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I knooow! But you can't make me this jealous and
not expect me to want some attention too!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Your own birthday is but two weeks away... Have
a little patience.
